description: Skeleton mapping from CarbonFlow aggregates to CDP Climate questionnaire concepts. Replace with your CDP account year and official datapoint IDs.

mapping.label: Gross Scope 1 (GHG Protocol)
mapping.notes: Report in tonnes in CDP where required

mapping.label: Gross Scope 2 (location-based) — grid average in CarbonFlow
mapping.notes: CarbonFlow uses a single grid factor; add market-based Scope 2 when you support certificates

mapping.label: Gross Scope 3
mapping.notes: Align category breakdown with CDP tables in future iterations

mapping.label: Organizational boundary
mapping.notes: Consolidation approach must be documented separately
